issues.description: Using fallback JWT secret in production
issues.fix: Set strong JWT_SECRET in environment variables
Split into smaller files or externalize CSS/JS
Add caching headers for static assets

issues.code:
<button type="submit" id="submitBtn" onclick="console.log('Button clicked');">
          Join Early Access
        </button>

<button 
            id="generateIdeasBtn" 
            onclick="generateIdeas()" 
            style="width: 100%; padding: 25px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); color: white; border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); border-radius: 18px; font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; backdrop-filter: blur(15px); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; margin-bottom: 40px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);"
            onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35)'; this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'"
            onmouseout="this.style.background='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25)'; this.style.transform='translateY(0)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'"
          >
            🚀 Generate AI Ideas
          </button>

<button 
                  onclick="becomeProvider()" 
                  style="padding: 18px 40px; background: white; color: #22c55e; border: none; border-radius: 15px; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; font-size: 1.1rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);"
                  onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-3px)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 20px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'"
                  onmouseout="this.style.transform='translateY(0)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'"
                >
                  🎯 Become a Provider
                </button>

<button 
                  onclick="generateMoreIdeas()" 
                  style="padding: 18px 40px; background: transparent; color: white; border: 3px solid white; border-radius: 15px; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; font-size: 1.1rem;"
                  onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)'; this.style.transform='translateY(-3px)'"
                  onmouseout="this.style.background='transparent'; this.style.transform='translateY(0)'"
                >
                  🔄 Generate More
                </button>

<button type="submit" id="submitBtn" onclick="console.log('Button clicked');">
          Join Early Access
        </button>

<button 
            id="generateIdeasBtn"

            onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35)'; this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'"
            onmouseout="this.style.background='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25)'; this.style.transform='translateY(0)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'"

<button

                  onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-3px)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 20px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'"
                  onmouseout="this.style.transform='translateY(0)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'"
                >

                </button>

<button 
                  onclick="generateMoreIdeas()" 
                  style="padding: 18px 40px; background: transparent; color: white; border: 3px solid white; border-radius: 15px; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; font-size: 1.1rem;"
                  onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)'; this.style.transform='translateY(-3px)'"

<button class="btn btn-sm btn-pill btn-primary" onclick="logout()">Log out</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-pill" style="width:100%;margin-top:8px" onclick="addService()">Create Service</button>

<button class="btn btn-primary btn-pill" onclick="setupStripe()" id="stripe-setup-btn"
                      style="width:100%;padding:14px">
                Connect my bank account →
              </button>

<button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm btn-pill" onclick="setupStripe()">
              Update bank account
            </button>

<button class="btn btn-primary btn-pill" onclick="setupStripe()">
              Complete setup →
            </button>

<button class="btn btn-primary btn-pill" onclick="saveReminderSettings()">
              Save Settings
            </button>

<button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="testReminders()">
              Test Reminders
            </button>

<button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="sendTestReminder('EMAIL_24H')">
                Test Email 24h
              </button>

<button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="sendTestReminder('EMAIL_2H')">
                Test Email 2h
              </button>

<button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="sendTestReminder('SMS_2H')">
                Test SMS 2h
              </button>

<button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="sendTestReminder('SMS_1H')">
                Test SMS 1h
              </button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showCreateApiKey()">Create API Key</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showReportBuilder()">Create Custom Report</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showAddTeamMember()">Add Team Member</button>

<button class="btn btn-primary btn-pill" style="flex:1" onclick="saveProfile()">
              💾 Save Changes
            </button>
<button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm btn-pill" onclick="deleteAccount()">Delete My Account</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-pill" style="width:100%" onclick="submitReview()">Submit Review</button>

<button class="btn btn-sm btn-pill btn-primary" onclick="pay(\''+b.id+'\',\''+
          esc(svc.title||'Service')+'\',\''+
          parseFloat(b.totalAmount||0).toFixed(2)+
        '\')">💳 Pay now</button>

<button id="pay-confirm-btn"
                    onclick="proceedToCheckout('${bookingId}')"
                    style="width:100%;background:#2563d4;color:#fff;border:none;
                           padding:14px;border-radius:100px;font-size:15px;
                           font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
                           transition:all .2s;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(37,99,212,0.3)">
              Continue to Secure Checkout →
            </button>
<button onclick="console.log('Button clicked');" type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">${workflow ? 'Update Workflow' : 'Create Workflow'}</button>
<button onclick="console.log('Button clicked');" type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Create API Key</button>
<button onclick="console.log('Button clicked');" type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Generate Report</button>
<button onclick="console.log('Button clicked');" type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Schedule Report</button>
<button onclick="console.log('Button clicked');" type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Update Organization</button>
<button onclick="console.log('Button clicked');" type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Send Invitation</button>
<button onclick="console.log('Button clicked');" type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Upgrade Tier</button>

issues.code:
<input 
                type="text" 
                id="skillInput" 
                placeholder="e.g. Web Development, Marketing, Design..." 
                style="width: 100%; padding: 18px; border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); border-radius: 15px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); color: white; font-size: 1.1rem; backdrop-filter: blur(15px); transition: all 0.3s; font-weight: 500;"
                onfocus="this.style.borderColor='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)'; this.style.background='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25)'; this.style.transform='translateY(-2px)'"
                onblur="this.style.borderColor='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4)'; this.style.background='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)'; this.style.transform='translateY(0)'"
              />
